description: Melinda May interrogates Deke Shaw for a full account of recent events. Deke tries to explain their unbelievable predicament, while May insists on hearing all the details. This brief scene serves as a narrative framing device, setting up Deke's recounting of the team's adventures after being stranded.

transcript.line: Agent Shaw, I want a full report. What happened? Start from the beginning.
You wouldn't believe me if I told you.
Try me, and we'll find out.
Boy, am I glad you guys are open. This thing has been on the fritz ever since last night's power surge.
Let me guess, you read the piece in River's End Daily.
Actually, we went to River's End High together. Class of ‘68? I'm Russell.
Ah, did you use to run around with Fat Sack and Petey?
I never really ran around with anyone.
Well, uh, imagine that. Listen, compadre, I got some big orders coming in, and I'm gonna need this puppy back, ASAP. Capiche?
